name: Blue Cheese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the sour cream and mayonnaise together.
2. Stir in the mustard, oregano, and black pepper.
3. Crumble the blue cheese and stir into the dressing.
4. Add the garlic oil and lemon juice, then whisk everything together.
5. Pour some of the dressing over the spinach and serve.
6. When off diet, additional garnishes like cheese, sprouts, croutons, or bacon can be added.
